title: Lead Frontend Developer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
